query:
SELECT o.id, c.locationUrl1, c.locationUrl2, o.location_link 
FROM orders o 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.customerId = c.id
WHERE o.status = 'accepted' OR o.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY o.id DESC 
LIMIT 10
command:

FROM orders o
